response.justification: The candidate has extensive senior-level experience but lacks demonstrated Java proficiency in recent roles, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and is significantly overqualified for an entry-level role, raising concerns about retention and alignment with junior responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical workshops
Deep understanding of agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing to meet required fluency
No recent Java project experience despite listed skill; focus is on TypeScript/DLang
Senior-level background suggests misalignment with junior role expectations and salary band
